summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of updated Yates Mar de Cortés landing page. Successfully verified hero section now uses background video instead of image carousel, and all yacht detail modals function correctly with complete yacht information and special Mar de Cortez price tiers feature.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components

passed_tests: Hero section displays background VIDEO instead of image carousel
Hero video has correct attributes (autoplay, loop, muted)
Derby yacht 'Ver Detalles y Reservar' opens modal with full details
Adios Dinero yacht 'Ver Detalles y Reservar' opens modal correctly
Annabella yacht 'Ver Detalles y Reservar' opens modal correctly
Mar de Cortez yacht 'Ver Detalles y Reservar' opens modal with 3 price tiers
Mar de Cortez modal shows correct price tiers: $3,500, $4,000, $4,500
Mar de Cortez modal shows capacity descriptions: 15, 20, 25 personas
All yacht modals display: image, description, specifications, services, includes
All yacht modals have functional reserve buttons
Modal reserve buttons scroll to contact form as expected
All 6 navigation links work correctly (Inicio, Flota, Experiencias, Proceso, FAQ, Contacto)
FAQ accordion opens and closes correctly
Contact form fields are fillable and functional
Yacht selection dropdown in contact form works
All 4 yacht cards display correctly in fleet section
Page loads without errors and displays properly
success_percentage: Frontend: 100% - All requested features working correctly
